result.stdout:
Description:
  TimeWarp Roo Tools - CLI toolkit for TimeWarp development workflows

Usage:
  TimewarpRooTools [command] [options] [[--] <additional arguments>...]]

Options:
  --check-update  Force a check for updates
  --no-check      Skip the update check
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  generate-roomodes  Generate .roomodes.json from roomodes markdown files
Additional Arguments:
  Arguments passed to the application that is being run.
